overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking along a sunny coastal beach with stilt houses, palm trees, and a long pier extending into the ocean. The character moves from rocky terrain past colorful beach houses, along the sandy shore, and finally to the water's edge where waves wash up on the sand.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky shoreline with elevated stilt houses

agents.ego_description: walking along the rocky shoreline past colorful beach houses built on stilts

entered.detail: colorful beach houses elevated on wooden stilts with balconies and large windows
tall palm trees swaying in the breeze between the houses
large boulders and rocky outcrops forming the shoreline foundation

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rocky coastal shoreline with modern stilt houses elevated above large boulders. Palm trees rise between the structures as the camera moves steadily forward along the terrain, passing the colorful beachfront properties under a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sandy beach with ocean shoreline

events.description: exits rocky shoreline area onto open sandy beach with expansive ocean view, first-person hands briefly visible

agents.ego_description: walking along the sandy beach toward the ocean shoreline with the sun reflecting off the water

entered.detail: expansive golden sand stretching along the coastline
calm blue ocean with gentle waves and bright sun reflection

segments.scene_description: Transitioning from the rocky shoreline, the scene opens into a wide sandy beach with the ocean stretching to the horizon. The bright midday sun creates a glare on the water's surface as the camera continues walking forward along the deserted beach.

scene_state.functional_zone: beach shoreline approaching a long wooden pier

events.description: long wooden pier becomes visible in the distance extending into the ocean

agents.ego_description: continuing along the beach toward the pier with additional beach houses visible on the left side

entered.detail: long wooden pier with support pillars extending far out into the ocean
row of modern beachfront houses lining the left side of the shore

segments.scene_description: As the walk continues along the shoreline, a long wooden pier comes into view on the left, extending far out into the calm ocean. Beach houses line the left side of the frame while gentle waves lap at the sandy shore on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: ocean waterline with waves washing on sand

events.description: camera tilts down to look at waves washing up on the sandy shore, first-person hands visible

agents.ego_description: standing at the water's edge looking down at the foamy waves washing over the sand

segments.scene_description: The camera reaches the water's edge and tilts down to focus on the gentle waves creating white foam as they wash up on the sand. The first-person hands are visible at the bottom of the frame as the character observes the water movement at their feet.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rocky coastal settlement toward the rhythmic edge of the ocean. It begins by moving steadily past modern, colorful stilt houses and palm trees elevated above large boulders under a clear blue sky. As the terrain shifts, the camera leaves the rocks behind to open onto a wide, deserted sandy beach where the midday sun creates a bright glare across the horizon. The scene then expands to reveal a long wooden pier extending into the calm water on the left, while the path continues along the shoreline between the beach houses and the tide. Finally, the camera reaches the water's edge and tilts downward, focusing on the white foam of gentle waves washing over the sand around the character's visible hands.
